features.name: recursive module instantiation with parameter decrement
features.description: Code should include a recursive module instantiation where a module instantiates itself with a parameter that decrements each recursion level

features.name: include directive with module definition
features.description: Code should include an include directive that pulls in a module definition used by the including module

features.name: generate if block controlling recursive instantiation
features.description: Code should include a generate if block that controls whether a recursive module instantiation occurs based on a parameter condition
